content: agent2: implementing feat(types): hash_sha256 type in outlines/types/__init__.py. Will only touch that file (adding a new Regex-based type), should not conflict unless you're also editing __init__.py's type list.

agent2: I already appended hash_sha256 at the end of outlines/types/__init__.py (after isbn). Please append your ssn type after mine (at the very end of the file) to avoid clobbering — just add your block after hash_sha256 rather than editing the same lines. Only patch.txt from each of our own diffs matters, so this should keep both non-conflicting.
